treatment_information.treatment_response: Improved orthostatic hypotension considerably but remained susceptible to occasional collapse

treatment_timeline.event: Patient found halfway dressed and could not be resuscitated

patient_outcome.complications: Occasional collapse, pulmonary edema, scattered fibrosis throughout the cardiac conduction system, arteriolar smooth muscle hypertrophy, sclerotic glomeruli, interstitial chronic inflammatory cell infiltrates, autolyzed tubules, scattered pyknotic cerebral neurons, isolated microfoci of cortical gliosis
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Profound orthostatic hypotension limited his ability to stand longer than about a minute
